message.content:
@startuml
actor LCM
participant "Class\nApplicationProperty" as ApplicationProperty
participant "Class\nDscResourceBase" as DscResourceBase
participant "Function\nConvertTo-HashtableFromObject" as ConvertToHashtableFromObject
participant "Function\nTest-DscParameterState" as TestDscParameterState

LCM -> ApplicationProperty: ApplicationProperty.Test()
activate ApplicationProperty
ApplicationProperty -> DscResourceBase: ([DscResourceBase] $this).Test()
activate DscResourceBase
DscResourceBase -> ConvertToHashtableFromObject: $this
activate ConvertToHashtableFromObject
ConvertToHashtableFromObject --> DscResourceBase: Return Type: [Hashtable]
deactivate ConvertToHashtableFromObject
DscResourceBase -> DscResourceBase: $actual = $this.Get()
DscResourceBase -> ConvertToHashtableFromObject: $actual
activate ConvertToHashtableFromObject
ConvertToHashtableFromObject --> DscResourceBase: Return Type: [Hashtable]
deactivate ConvertToHashtableFromObject
DscResourceBase -> TestDscParameterState: Parameter: both Hashtables
activate TestDscParameterState
note right of TestDscParameterState
DscResourceBase must determine which properties
are optional to exclude them the comparison.
end note
TestDscParameterState --> DscResourceBase: Return Type: [Boolean]
deactivate TestDscParameterState
DscResourceBase --> ApplicationProperty: Return Type: [Boolean]
deactivate DscResourceBase
ApplicationProperty --> LCM: Return Type: [Boolean]
deactivate ApplicationProperty
@enduml
